parameters.query: SELECT * FROM librarian_want_list WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY priority DESC LIMIT 20
INSERT INTO librarian_acquisitions (acquisition_run_id, trigger_type, status, run_started_at) VALUES ('{{$json.run_id}}', 'cron_daily', 'in_progress', datetime('now'))

parameters.expression: ={{ Object.entries($json).map(([key, value]) => ({ item: value, index: key })) }}

parameters.query: INSERT OR IGNORE INTO librarian_content (content_hash, title, author, source, source_url, local_file_path, file_format, subject_category, confidence_score, acquisition_run_id, acquired_at) VALUES (lower(hex(randomblob(16))), '{{$json.title}}', '{{$json.author}}', '{{$json.source}}', '{{$json.source_url}}', '{{$json.file_path}}', 'pdf', '{{$json.category}}', {{$json.confidence}}, '{{$env.LIBRARIAN_RUN_ID}}', datetime('now'))
UPDATE librarian_want_list SET status = 'acquired', completed_at = datetime('now') WHERE search_query = '{{$json.item.search_query}}' AND status = 'pending'
